tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible prediabetes. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and glucose, are within normal limits except for a slightly elevated chloride (107.7 mmol/L), which is not clinically significant in isolation. No acute laboratory abnormalities detected. Recommend monitoring glycemic control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Punkt Lekarski w Cieksynie
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
